description: A contemplative daily reading practice — open book APIs as your library, real public-domain passages to sit with, and a reading journal that's yours.

tools.name: authors_get
tools.description: Biographical metadata for an Open Library author. Required: authorId. Returns the Author.

params.name: authorId
params.description: Open Library author id, e.g. OL23919A

tools.name: search-json_search
tools.description: Full-text search over Open Library's catalog. Returns works with title, author, year, cover, and full-text availability. Required: q. Optional: fields, limit, page (plus 1 more).

params.name: q
params.description: Search query (title, author, subject, or free text)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated fields to return (e.g. key,title,author_name,first_publish_year,cover_i,has_fulltext). Use * for all.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order (e.g. new, old, rating, editions, readinglog)

tools.name: works_get
tools.description: Full metadata for an Open Library work (description, subjects, covers, links). Required: workId. Returns the Work.

params.name: workId
params.description: Open Library work id, e.g. OL45804W
